candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A line exists, but there is no selected COGS parent bucket on the income statement and nothing indicates this row is specifically tied to cost of sales / cost of revenue. To avoid unsupported allocation and double counting, do not add it to COGS.

variables.notes: No COGS row was selected earlier, so no operating D&A row can be confidently assigned to COGS from this excerpt.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating line item presented at the same level as 'General and Administrative' and 'Research and Development', rather than appearing as a sub-component under either selected XSGA row. Relative to the selected XSGA bucket (General and Administrative + Research and Development), it appears outside that bucket and should therefore be added separately later. No more granular SG&A/R&D D&A component rows are shown, so use the summary row.

variables.notes: OK. Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are only 'General and Administrative' and 'Research and Development'. The standalone 'Depreciation and Amortization' row appears separately within operating expenses, so it should be added to XSGA_DA. R&D is already separately visible and mapped in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, but there is no distinct 'Amortization in R&D' row here; only the total D&A summary row is available.
